name: 19Pin USB Header USB3.0 1 to 2 Splitter Internal USB Extension 20cm Compatible with Computer Parts Motherboard Models Works with Desktop PC Models for Part Number 19Pin
shortName: 19Pin USB Header USB3.0 1 to 2 Splitter Internal USB Extension 20cm
description: An internal USB 3.0 header splitter for motherboards supporting 1-to-2 port expansion in desktop PCs.
